# Paladin
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Paladin&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The paladin can deal damage at close range, wear armor and heal himself and his allies.
| weaponSlot = Sword
| weapon = Short Sword
| abilitySlot = Seal
| ability = Seal of the Initiate
| armor = HeavyArmor
| armorLink = Heavy Armors

| hpStart = 250
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 855

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 2 - 8
| mpCap = 252

| attStart = 12
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 50

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 35

| spdStart = 12
| spdLevel = 0 - 2
| spdCap = 55

| dexStart = 10
| dexLevel = 0 - 2
| dexCap = 45

| vitStart = 10
| vitLevel = 0 - 1
| vitCap = 40

| wisStart = 10
| wisLevel = 1 - 2
| wisCap = 75
}}
